data.title: Federal Reserve Officials Anticipate Inflation Rise Due to Tariffs
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's meeting minutes reveal that officials expect tariffs to contribute to an increase in inflation rates this year. Nearly all participants at the meeting perceive inflation risks as leaning upwards, while employment risks are seen as trending downwards.

data.title: BTC breaks through 82,000 USDT, up 6.06% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 82,000 USDT and is now at 82,046.3 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 6.06%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Federal Reserve meeting minutes: All participants believed that it was appropriate to keep interest rates unchanged given the significant uncertainty in the economic outlook
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve meeting minutes: All participants believed that it was appropriate to keep interest rates unchanged given the obvious uncertainty in the economic outlook. Most participants pointed out that the inflationary impact from a variety of factors may be more persistent than they expected. (Jinshi)

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 195 million US dollars, mainly short orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 195 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 18.1604 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 177 million US dollars.

data.title: Fed minutes: Officials expect tariffs to lead to higher inflation this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve meeting minutes: Officials expect tariffs this year to lead to higher inflation rates, and almost all participants believe that inflation risks are biased to the upside, while employment risks are biased to the downside. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 8.54% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 09, 2025, 17:52 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,601.099976 USDT, with a narrowed 8.54% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. White House Announces Tariff Reduction During Negotiations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. White House has announced that tariff levels will be reduced to a uniform 10% during ongoing negotiations. This decision is part of the discussions aimed at addressing trade issues. The move is expected to facilitate smoother trade relations and negotiations.
